output.summary: Fixed all 3 QA issues (FQA-001, FQA-002, FQA-003) by removing manual attribute extraction from both PHP templates and adding comprehensive @var docblocks. Both QuickLinks.php and QuickLinkItem.php now rely on theme's automatic attribute extraction via extract($attributes, EXTR_SKIP) and include proper @var documentation for all camelCase attribute variables. All variable references now use null coalescing operator (??) for safe defaults. Build passed successfully with no TypeScript errors. QuickLinks files have no linting errors.

fixesApplied.description: Removed manual attribute extraction from QuickLinks.php
changes: Removed lines 10-13: manual $eyebrow, $heading, $description, $buttons extraction
Added comprehensive @var docblock listing all camelCase attributes (lines 5-14)
Updated all variable references to use null coalescing operator: $eyebrow ?? '', $heading ?? '', etc.
Updated $hasContent check to use ?? operators for all attributes
Updated get_template_part() call to use ?? operators for all passed variables

fixesApplied.description: Removed manual attribute extraction from QuickLinkItem.php
changes: Removed lines 10-13: manual $title, $url, $postId, $opensInNewTab extraction
Added comprehensive @var docblock listing all camelCase attributes (lines 5-13)
Updated URL resolution check to use ?? operators: empty( $url ?? '' ) && ! empty( $postId ?? null )
Updated validation check to use ?? operators: empty( $title ?? '' ) || empty( $url ?? '' )
Updated $opensInNewTab conditional checks to use ?? operator: $opensInNewTab ?? false

QuickLinkItem.php: Added @var documentation for $title, $url, $postId, $opensInNewTab
QuickLinkItem.php: Added documentation for $content and $block
Both files now include descriptive comments explaining auto-extraction from $attributes
Removed manual attribute extraction (lines 10-13)
Added comprehensive @var docblock with all attribute variables
Updated all variable references to use null coalescing operator
Maintained all functionality while following theme conventions
